meta.source: SI.n.0 (Databento bbo-1m real, 10y, 2016-01-04…2026-05-11) + GC.n.0 (SMT partner, forward-filled)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: GC took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (SI short → GC low<GC pre_low; SI long → GC high>GC pre_high)

meta.tick: SI_TICK=0.005 (Comex silver); detect_setup_si is a local clone of detect_setup_metals with SI_TICK substitution
